subcodes.first_line: O thou seeker of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. Thou hast written of the severe calamity that hath befallen thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب ملکوت نامه ات رسید از مصیبت کبری وفات قرین محترمت مرقوم نموده بودی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @education of children; moral education, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
